refine_constraint: You must provide the answer within 2 to 8 interaction turns with the tools, each individual tool can be called at most 3 times during the process, the total number of tool calls across all interaction turns must not exceed 5, and the agent must invoke at most 2 unique tool types simultaneously in any single interaction turn.
constraint: At most 2 (Sets an upper limit on the number of unique tool types the agent can invoke simultaneously in a interaction single turn.)
